title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§105.  Budget to include additional salary

The police jury of each of said parishes shall annually, and at the same time as they prepare their general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries as herein fixed.  

Added by Acts 1950, No. 345, §3.
